Jamal lost his job suddenly. One day, he was working, and the next day, he was fired. He felt shocked and scared. How would he pay his bills? His heart sank. Every day was hard. Then, Jamal met a kind woman named Lila. She helped him find a new path. Together, they looked for jobs that matched his skills. Slowly, hope returned. Jamal realized that this setback could be a new beginning. He smiled for the first time in weeks.
